takes.oil extends surge as fresh us strikes ag: US strikes amplify war premium, pushing prices higher despite oversupply.
takes.us strikes iran and revokes oil sales pe: Revoked oil sales permit signals tighter supply, lifting prices sharply.
takes.live updates us conducting new strikes i: Ceasefire collapse and renewed strikes heighten supply risks, boosting prices.
takes.u s strikes iran for second straight day: Second day of strikes intensifies supply fears, sustaining upward price momentum.
takes.us strikes iran after ceasefire ends rai: Ceasefire's end fuels escalation concerns, adding to the war-risk premium.
